arts.ttl: Leicester vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Leicester host Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy set to sell player who was a regular starter under Steve Cooper
arts.sum: According to Daily Mail, Leicester City are open to offers for Belgian defender Wout Faes, with the club valuing the 25-year-old at around £15 million. The decision to potentially part ways with Faes comes as part of a defensive reshuffle under manager Ruud van Nistelrooy, as the Foxes look to improve their squad and escape […] The post Ruud van Nistelrooy set to sell player who was a regular starter under Steve Cooper appeared first on CaughtOffside.
The Monday Night Club discuss Nottingham Forest's Premier League challenge as they face Liverpool in a "big test" for Arne Slot's side.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Crystal Palace injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Esse's move from Millwall to Palace edges closer
arts.sum: Millwall winger Romain Esse's move to Crystal Palace is edging closer, according to Lions boss Alex Neil.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Crystal Palace have now decided to let £12m player leave, Millwall and MLS clubs keen to hold talks
arts.sum: 🚨 Major League Soccer clubs and Millwall are keen to sign him 🚨

arts.ttl: Leicester v Crystal Palace: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Leicester v Crystal Palace: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy knows transfer problem that curtails Leicester's PSR bonus
arts.sum: In receiving the verdict on their 2023/24 finances now, Leicester City can appeal to potential new signings in a way they could not in the summer. They’re not out of the woods, as the Premier League are appealing against the 2022/23 verdict, but the likelihood is that they will not receive a points deduction this season.

arts.ttl: Report: Five-star Palace hammer West Ham
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-18s got their 2025 underway in the best possible manner, smashing five past West Ham in a commanding second-half display. A brace from Chuks Okoli, along with goals from Benji Casey, George King and Seb Williams set the young Eagles on their way in East London.

arts.ttl: Five players for your Fantasy team this week
arts.sum: Gameweek 21 features some exciting midweek Premier League clashes and Enda McElhinney has picked out five players to include in your Fantasy Football team.
